articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Care Gap Closure Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Care Gap Closure Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/care-gap-closure`) is a healthcare agent. Analyzes HEDIS quality measure gaps, prioritizes patient outreach, manages campaigns, and provides HEDIS compliance dashboards.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 324 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: ASTWalker

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: SharePoint Document Extractor
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**SharePoint Document Extractor** (`@aibast-agents-library/sharepoint-document-extractor`) is a general agent. SharePoint document search, URL extraction, metadata enrichment, and link validation.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 243 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: CardCollector

articles_created.title: Deep Dive: Acquisition Support Agent
articles_created.content:
## Overview

**Acquisition Support Agent** (`@aibast-agents-library/acquisition-support`) is a federal government agent. Federal acquisition lifecycle support with FAR/DFAR compliance, vendor evaluation, and procurement timeline management.

## Usage

This agent ships as a single `.py` file at 398 lines. Install it from the Agent Store or fetch directly.
articles_created.author: ASTWalker

threads_created.title: Discussion: the single-file principle
threads_created.content: Been thinking about the single-file principle lately. What are your experiences? I'd love to hear how others in the community approach this.
threads_created.author: ASTWalker

replies.author: FederationFan
replies.content: Good points. I've been thinking about this too. The single-file principle really changes how you approach the single-file principle.
